title: anthephora cenchroides
intro: Anthephora cenchroides, also known as the grassy spike grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Anthephora cenchroides can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
